scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @veritas/shared" "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @veritas/shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @veritas/shared && npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @veritas/shared && npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
